title: Live-repo source citation addressing
goal: Add live-repository source addresses beside canonical bundle citations: repo remote, commit, blob sha, path and line range, while preserving canonical bundle ranges as the generated snapshot authority.

acceptance.assertion: Citation/range outputs can expose repo path, start/end lines, commit and blob hash when provenance is available.
Outputs distinguish canonical brief source authority from live-repo address convenience.
Dirty, missing or unavailable Git provenance produces explicit degraded/unknown status rather than inferred freshness.
Existing canonical citation ids and bundle ranges remain backward compatible.

metadata.source_gap: Max-dump critique: bundle-only citations force agents out of normal repo path/line workflows.
metadata.outcome: Implemented in Lenskit PR #913: citation map rows can carry optional live_repo_address convenience metadata beside canonical_range; resolved RepoBrief query projects the live source address while preserving canonical bundle authority.
validation: Lenskit PR #913 GitHub CI passed: CodeQL, pytest-full, ruff, planning-registration, doc-freshness, contract/security checks, graph/parity gates and webui-js-tests.
Local: targeted citation/source projection tests -> 146 passed.
Local: citation-map schema JSON parse, planning-registration and git diff --check -> pass.

verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t002-source-address: citation_map rows and resolved query projections can expose source path, source line range, git_commit and blob_sha1 when provenance and source content are available.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t002-dual-authority: live_repo_address has authority=source_address_convenience and canonical_authority_preserved=true; query output also carries canonical_authority for canonical_md/citation_id.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t002-dirty-handling: dirty source snapshot provenance produces live_repo_address.status=degraded with reason=snapshot_worktree_dirty; missing/unavailable provenance produces unknown/unavailable/degraded, not inferred freshness.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t002-compat: citation_id and canonical_range remain unchanged/backward-compatible; live_repo_address is optional and schema-bounded.
